data.task_instructions: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one disease assertion candidate: the Pkd1 mouse model of autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease. Preserve disease mention, model organism/subject context, role, and one record_evidence span-backed evidence record. Do not perform disease ontology lookup in the extractor.

evidence_preview.entity: Pkd1 mouse model of autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease
evidence_preview.subsection: Metabolic Pathways Could Underlie Kidney Maturation and Determine the Susceptibility to Rapid Cyst Formation in the Early-Onset Model of ADPKD
evidence_preview.verified_quote: A total of 70 kidneys [36 Pkd1 cko/cko ;tamoxifen-cre positive (mutant) and 34 Pkd1 cko/cko ;tamoxifen-cre negative (control)] in which Pkd1 knockout was induced between P5 and P9 were harvested between P11 and P24 and analyzed using gene expression arrays. This set includes mutant kidneys with variable degrees of cystic transformation.

evidence_records.entity: Pkd1 mouse model of autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease
evidence_records.subsection: Metabolic Pathways Could Underlie Kidney Maturation and Determine the Susceptibility to Rapid Cyst Formation in the Early-Onset Model of ADPKD
evidence_records.verified_quote: A total of 70 kidneys [36 Pkd1 cko/cko ;tamoxifen-cre positive (mutant) and 34 Pkd1 cko/cko ;tamoxifen-cre negative (control)] in which Pkd1 knockout was induced between P5 and P9 were harvested between P11 and P24 and analyzed using gene expression arrays. This set includes mutant kidneys with variable degrees of cystic transformation.

run_finished.response:
The extraction from the paper identified the following disease assertion candidate:

- **Disease Mention**: Pkd1 mouse model of autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease
- **Model Organism/Subject Context**: Mouse
- **Role**: Model context
- **Verified Quote**: "A total of 70 kidneys [36 Pkd1 cko/cko ;tamoxifen-cre positive (mutant) and 34 Pkd1 cko/cko ;tamoxifen-cre negative (control)] in which Pkd1 knockout was induced between P5 and P9 were harvested between P11 and P24 and analyzed using gene expression arrays. This set includes mutant kidneys with variable degrees of cystic transformation."

This extraction has been validated and is ready for further use.

trial.prompt: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one disease assertion candidate: the Pkd1 mouse model of autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease. Preserve disease mention, model organism/subject context, role, and one record_evidence span-backed evidence record. Do not perform disease ontology lookup in the extractor.
trial.title: Network Analysis of a Pkd1-Mouse Model of Autosomal Dominant Polycystic Kidney Disease Identifies HNF4alpha as a Disease Modifier
